wins: Record Q3 data center revenue of $51.2 billion, up 66% year-over-year
Blackwell and Rubin revenue visibility of $0.5 trillion from start of 2026 to end of 2026
GB300 ramp contributing 2/3 of Blackwell revenue
Collaborations with OpenAI, Anthropic, and HUMAIN for AI infrastructure
NVIDIA's CUDA ecosystem and long useful life of GPUs
risks: H20 sales were approximately $50 million, with purchase orders not materializing due to geopolitical issues
Uncertainty around supply chain constraints for China market
Potential for supply to lag demand over the next 12-18 months
Input costs rising, impacting gross margins
OpEx growth due to increased investments in innovation
